MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.title: Morgan
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.descrip: The tyrant Queen who ruled Fairy Britain for two thousand years - and died countless times to keep it standing. She seeds Curses with replicas of Rhongomyniad, charges her Noble Phantasm across her two lives, and rises from death stronger than before.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.goldMon: Gold... A queen does not stoop to pick up coins. Consider it tax, collected in person.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.eventDe: Somewhere unseen, Habetrot's thread pulls taut... The Queen has died countless times, and this death was not the one that counts. Morgan rises.
MORGANBERSERKER-MORGAN_BERSERKER.aromaPr: It smells of rain over Orkney. For a single breath, the Queen is only Aesc again... She does not call it comfort. But she does not turn away.
You keep your Queen waiting. Decide.
So... this is the death that counts. How tiresome...
